rationale: The candidate translation is technically sound and uses natural Hindi phrasing for a developer audience. The previous judge report suggested a fix for a heading link, but upon inspection of the candidate MDX, the link `[Promises को कुछ न कुछ पकड़ना चाहिए](#1-promises-को-कुछ-न-कुछ-पकड़ना-चाहिए)` already correctly matches the localized heading `#### #1 Promises को कुछ न कुछ पकड़ना चाहिए`. The translation maintains the unlisted flag and correctly localizes image paths and internal links.

suggestionLog.reason: The heading link fragment must match the localized heading slug to avoid broken links.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
